title: Super Fast PVP Client
body: A hypixel focused Minecraft 1.8.9 mod pack. With preloaded resource packs featuring PVP packs for bedwars and skywars. The pack features discord rich presence It has also been optimized so you can play the game to its fullest potential. It also features OneConfig, a mod library that you would see on a client like Badlion or Lunar Client.
